untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise definitions of 'clear support line' and 'clear resistance line' which are subjective and not provided. Support/resistance levels cannot be operationalized without specific price levels or technical definitions. The signal also requires detection of 'failed breakout' which requires multi-bar pattern recognition beyond simple indicator conditions. Time threshold for reversal ('after X days') is marked THRESHOLD_NEEDED and not specified.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points (s1/r1) as proxy for support/resistance, but this is speculative without author's definitions. A proper implementation would require: (1) explicit support/resistance level calculation method, (2) breakout confirmation rules, (3) specific reversal time window, (4) multi-bar pattern detection logic not available in simple indicator operators.
